On this page

Monad.ai ​

Monad.ai is the daemon host for the me:// runtime.

This package exposes:

  • ledger persistence
  • claim/open flows
  • namespace routing
  • semantic path resolution
  • remote exchange metadata for me:// targets

Entry Points ​

  • Monad vs Cleaker
  • Routing Spec
  • Remote Exchange Spec
  • API Docs

Package ​

  • Runtime entry: server.ts
  • Source tree: src/
  • Tests: tests/

Commands ​

bash
npm run start
npm run docs:api
npm run docs:build
